name: Jianglong Shipbuilding Co., Ltd.
summary: Jianglong Shipbuilding Co., Ltd. designs and constructs customized commercial and defense vessels in China and internationally. The company's products include patrol boats and interceptors; passenger ferries and car ferries; sightseeing boats, such as fishing and cruise boats, and yachts; and work boats, including windfarm work boats, research and survey vessels, firefighting vessels, crew supply vessels, and pilot vessels. Jianglong Shipbuilding Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Zhongshan, China.
